reason: Michael Hornung, project manager at SUSS MicroTec Lithography GmbH Garching, co-author on Mask Aligner Lithography papers (AMALITH, Advanced mask aligner lithography). Matches initial M., affiliation (SUSS) and all three sample titles.

Friedrich Stinzing, scientist at ECAP (Erlangen Centre for Astroparticle Physics), FAU Erlangen since 1991. Co-author on 'Deflectometric measurement of large mirrors' (2014) for CTA mirror tiles. Matches initial F., FAU Erlangen, deflectometric mirror metrology for telescopes.

Jan Matrisch, TH Köln (Institute of Applied Optics and Electronics), co-author with Stefan Altmeyer on 'Quantitative Phasenrekonstruktion in Echtzeit unter Verwendung der Intensitäts-Transport-Gleichung' (DGaO 2011) and holographic multiplexing papers. Dr. Reinhard Voelkel (Völkel), Founder/CEO of SUSS MicroOptics SA Neuchâtel, EPIC CEO Award 2022, SPIE Fellow. Author of 150+ publications on micro-optics, mask aligner lithography, AMALITH. Direct match.

Martin Bischoff at Qioptiq Photonics GmbH Göttingen (martin.bischoff@qioptiq.de), co-author on 'Mixed oxide coatings for optics' (Applied Optics 2011) and 'Postdeposition treatment of IBS coatings for UV applications' (2014). Stefan Mewes, co-author with Martin Bischoff on 'Mixed oxide coatings for optics' (Applied Optics 2011) – same Qioptiq group, same DUV/coatings topic. Direct match.

Dr.-Ing. Dipl.-Phys. Raimund Schlüßler at TU Dresden Biotechnology Center (BIOTEC). Multiple Brillouin microscopy papers (zebrafish spinal cord, axolotl regeneration, etc.). ORCID confirmed via ResearchGate profile. Direct match.

Christian Stegmann, Director Astroparticle Physics at DESY Zeuthen since 2011/2019, Prof. Astroparticle Physics Uni Potsdam, co-initiator of CTA. Works on Cherenkov telescope mirror development which matches deflectometric mirror sample titles. Helmholtz Alliance for Astroparticle Physics affiliation matches.

Johannes Endres at PTB (later Georg-Simon-Ohm University Nürnberg), co-author with Bodermann/Wurm on scatterometry papers ('Numerical investigations of the influence of different commonly applied approximations in scatterometry' SPIE 8789, DUV scatterometry papers).
